PLEAS OF INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS
All individual defendants, with the exception of MARTIN BORMANN who could not be located, in effect pleaded not guilty to the
Indictment
. The plea of ERNST KALTENBRUNNER was entered 10 December 1945; the pleas of the other defendants, 21 November 1945.
